name: construction contractors managing 5–15 projects/month tool
description: For construction contractors managing 5–15 projects/month, inaccurate progress reporting causes cash flow gaps. We provide automated progress reports instead of manual spreadsheets and outdated reporting tools.
problem_solved: Inaccurate progress reporting and estimates lead to cash flow gaps.
features: manual data entry for job site updates
